summary: An exceptional test suite that thoroughly covers unit testing via BATS and end-to-end testing via an automated `act` harness. It rigorously validates glob pattern behaviors (single vs double star), rule priorities, sorting, deduplication, and various error conditions. Test design is highly modular, using setup/teardown functions for isolated temporary directories and a well-structured script to orchestrate the Docker-based CI tests without dirtying the working tree.
